Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid user details including email, password, and confirm password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the home page.
